name: peage-mcp
display_name: péage — give your agent a wallet
description: Give your agent a prepaid fiat wallet — pay any API per call in cents, no crypto, no subscriptions, with spending caps.
long_description: peage-mcp puts a prepaid EUR wallet from the peage rail (https://peage.intrane.fr) into any MCP-capable agent. The agent mints a wallet (new wallets include free starter credit), pays APIs per call in cents via a signed-receipt flow, and stays inside spending caps you control. The human appears once: paying a Stripe top-up link. One static machin (MFL) binary — no Node, no Python.

tools.name: peage_setup
tools.description: Mint the wallet once (includes free starter credit); token stored locally

tools.name: peage_topup
tools.description: Stripe Checkout URL to fund the wallet — the human pays once

tools.name: peage_paid_request
tools.description: Call any peage-metered API with the wallet attached

tools.name: peage_set_limits
tools.description: Per-call and per-merchant daily spending caps

tools.name: peage_verify_receipt
tools.description: Publicly verify any signed charge receipt

tools.name: peage_solvency
tools.description: Audit the rail's live ledger invariant

tools.name: peage_services
tools.description: Discover peage-metered APIs the agent can pay for
